tasks.task: Create a Python function that takes a list of strings as input and returns the length of the longest string in the list.
Generate a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy with the necessary permissions to access S3.
Write a regular expression that matches any string containing the phrase 'password' but not 'admin'.
Create a Python function that takes a dictionary of user credentials and returns a set of unique usernames.
Generate a JSON object representing an AWS CloudWatch metric with the name 'EC2InstanceCPUUtilization' and unit 'Percent'.
Write a regular expression that matches any string containing only alphanumeric characters and has a length of exactly 10 characters.
Create a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name as input and returns the URL of the bucket's homepage.
Generate a JSON object representing an AWS Lambda function with the necessary environment variables to process HTTP requests.
Write a regular expression that matches any string containing the phrase 'https://www.example.com' but not 'http://'.
Create a Python function that takes a list of integers as input and returns the sum of all even numbers in the list.
